title: FAKIR: Foundational Architecture for Knowledge, Intelligence & Reasoning (UKOP kernel)
description: Kernel of the Universal Knowledge Operating Platform (UKOP). v0.7: everything third-party-configurable via dome.config.json (content, worlds, gallery, videos, spawn) over the zistgah/dome lib (marker census 17/14/16/9/2/1). The 9,350 seed points form a small-point cluster beneath the oculus - individually scattered, individually floating, individually CLICKABLE via window-level picking (the #gl layer is pointer-events:none by design; v0.6's canvas-level handlers could never fire). Seeding remains layer x domain x language (ILM registries live). Flight: cinematic spawn at distance, altitude hold, gravity + yaw/pitch/roll sensitivity settings, thrust-vectored roll, per-world gravity (Mahtab .165, Bahram .38, Ceres .029, Station A1 0), 10 Hz zdome:drone emitter for future multi-pilot presence, debug overlay. The chakra dial and oculus jewels ride the hall; the planet below turns with the dome, with the yaw baked into the pilot frame at oculus escape. Viewer's gallery rotates the 11-poster corpus on the floor from config; YouTube screens play via overlay. Headless jsdom oracle: click-to-seed proven by synthesized window events landing 2.4 px under the cursor; hold 20.000; yaw 0.99; rollX -2.66. Dome lib seeded as zistgah/dome. Poster corpus DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21436552.
notes: (c) 1993-2026 Abhishek Choudhary. All rights reserved. AI model: Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic). DOI injected post-mint; no fabrication.
